About the job

Founding Engineer — Equity Only

Company: Syndi

Location: Remote (UK or Europe)

Commitment: 35+ hours per week, with some weekend availability

Compensation: Equity only at this stage

Syndi is building a new way for people to play the lottery together.

We are a UK-based startup making lottery syndicates simple, transparent and digital. Our mission is to turn lottery play from a solo, transactional habit into a social, team-based experience.

The company is founded by people with experience from Meta, Google and McKinsey, and we are now looking for a strong Software Engineer to join the early team on an equity-only basis.

This role is for someone who wants to be part of something impactful from an early stage and be directly involved in core product development. You will not be sitting on the edge of the product. You will be working on the systems, flows and features that define how Syndi works.

The role

This is a hands-on full-stack development role with meaningful ownership across the product.

We are looking for someone who is comfortable working across complex systems and can think beyond just writing tickets. You should be able to understand product requirements, spot edge cases, design robust solutions and ship quickly.

You will work closely with the founding team across backend systems, frontend user flows, payments, subscriptions, customer experience and internal operational tooling.

The expected commitment is 25–30 hours per week, with some weekend availability required. This role would suit someone who has the flexibility to contribute consistently and be responsive during key product, payment or operational moments.

Experience in fintech, e-commerce, iGaming, payments, subscriptions or other transaction-heavy environments would be highly valuable. That said, we care more about strong product-building ability, engineering judgment and ownership than a specific sector background.

What you’ll work on

You will help us build and improve core parts of the Syndi platform, including:

  • Full-stack customer-facing product features
  • Subscription and recurring payment flows
  • Wallet, payment and enrolment logic
  • Lottery draw, ticket and syndicate management systems
  • Admin and operational tooling
  • Data integrity, auditability and edge-case handling
  • Scalable architecture as the platform grows
  • Improvements to reliability, usability and customer experience

What we’re looking for

We are looking for a Founding Engineer who can take real ownership of core product development and help build Syndi from the ground up.

You should ideally have:

  • 8+ years of commercial software development experience
  • Strong full-stack engineering experience, with confidence across both frontend and backend development
  • A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Data Science or another numerate discipline
  • Experience building and shipping real products used by customers
  • Strong experience working with complex business logic, ideally involving payments, subscriptions, wallets, e-commerce, fintech, iGaming or other transaction-heavy systems
  • A solid builder mindset — someone who can turn messy product requirements into simple, robust and scalable solutions
  • The ability to work independently, take ownership and make sensible technical decisions without needing constant direction
  • Strong attention to edge cases, reliability, data integrity and user impact
  • Comfort working in an early-stage startup environment where priorities can move quickly
  • Good communication skills, with the ability to explain trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • A desire to be involved in core product development, not just isolated implementation work
  • Availability to commit 25–30 hours per week, including some weekend availability when needed


Our current stack

Our product is built using modern web technologies, including React, Node.js / NestJS and AWS. Experience with this stack is helpful, but we are open to strong engineers who can adapt quickly.


Why join Syndi

This is an opportunity to join at a very early stage and help shape the product, architecture and company.

You will be working directly with the founding team and have meaningful ownership from day one. This role is best suited to someone who is excited by startups, enjoys solving messy product and systems problems, and wants to build something impactful with real customer usage.


Compensation

This is an equity-only role at this stage. We are looking for someone who can contribute 35 hours per week while we continue building traction and raising further capital.


How to apply

Please send us your CV, LinkedIn profile or GitHub, along with a short note on what you have built and why you are interested in Syndi.

Requirements added by the job poster

• 5+ years of work experience with Node.js

• 4+ years of work experience with React.js
